settings.title: Acupuncture
settings.description: Personalized acupuncture treatments designed to support physical, emotional, and internal balance through traditional Chinese medicine principles.

settings.title: Moxibustion (Moxa)
settings.description: A traditional heat therapy using moxa to stimulate circulation, restore warmth, and support the body’s natural healing processes.

settings.title: Cupping Therapy
settings.description: A therapeutic technique using suction cups to release muscle tension, improve blood circulation, reduce pain, and support detoxification and recovery.

settings.title: Gua Sha
settings.description: A traditional therapeutic technique using smooth tools to gently stimulate the skin and fascia, improve circulation, release muscular tension, support lymphatic flow, and promote healing and relaxation.

settings.title: Tuina Massage
settings.description: A therapeutic Chinese medical massage combining acupressure and manual techniques to relieve muscular tension, improve circulation, and restore balance in the body.

settings.title: Electroacupuncture
settings.description: Modern acupuncture therapy using gentle electrical stimulation to support pain relief, muscle recovery, circulation, and nervous system regulation.

settings.title: Aesthetic Acupuncture
settings.description: A natural facial rejuvenation treatment designed to improve skin tone, stimulate collagen production, reduce tension in facial muscles, and support overall wellbeing from within.

settings.title: Nutritional Advice According to TCM
settings.description: Personalized nutritional guidance based on the principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine. Nutrition is adapted to each individual’s constitution, symptoms, and energetic balance in order to support digestion, strengthen vitality, improve overall health, and complement acupuncture treatments. Recommendations may help with fatigue, digestive disorders, hormonal balance, stress, sleep, immunity, pregnancy support, and general wellbeing.

settings.title: Infrared Light Therapy
settings.description: A gentle and non-invasive therapy using infrared light to support healing, improve circulation, reduce inflammation, relieve muscular tension, and promote relaxation. Infrared therapy may be used alongside acupuncture and other TCM treatments to support pain relief, recovery, stress reduction, and overall wellbeing.

settings.heading: Healing Experiences Designed For Your Wellbeing

settings.title: Labor Induction Support
settings.description: Natural support focused on encouraging the body’s readiness for labor while promoting relaxation and overall wellbeing during full-term pregnancy.

settings.title: Postpartum Recovery
settings.description: Holistic support after childbirth to restore energy, support emotional wellbeing, assist recovery, and help rebalance the body during the postpartum period.

settings.title: Hormonal & Gynecological Support
settings.description: Personalized treatments for menstrual irregularities, PMS, hormonal imbalance, menopause symptoms, endometriosis, and overall women’s wellness.

settings.heading: Acupuncture & Therapies
settings.description: Traditional and modern holistic therapies designed to restore balance, support recovery, and promote overall wellbeing through personalized care.

settings.title: Holistic Support
settings.text: We focus on long-term balance, not temporary symptom relief.

settings.title: Calm & Restorative Experience
settings.text: A peaceful environment designed for comfort and healing.

settings.title: Personalized Care
settings.text: Every treatment is tailored to your body and wellness goals.

settings.question: Is acupuncture safe during pregnancy?
settings.answer: Yes. Gentle acupuncture treatments can safely support many stages of pregnancy when performed by a qualified practitioner.

settings.question: Can acupuncture support fertility treatments such as IVF?
settings.answer: Acupuncture is often used alongside IVF and fertility treatments to support relaxation, hormonal balance, and overall wellbeing.

settings.question: How many sessions are usually recommended?
settings.answer: Every individual is different. Treatment frequency depends on your wellness goals, health history, and stage of care.

settings.question: What should I expect during my first consultation?
settings.answer: Your first session includes a personalized consultation, wellness assessment, and treatment plan tailored to your needs.

settings.question: Are treatments personalized?
settings.answer: Yes. Every treatment is customized to support your body, symptoms, and overall wellness journey.

settings.question: Do I need previous experience with acupuncture?
settings.answer: Not at all. Treatments are designed to feel calm, supportive, and comfortable for first-time clients.
